truthPolicy: A chapter is complete only when every required proof category is complete and its named automated proof passes from a clean production build.

requirements.gameplay: Create founder and company; tour the Garage Bay; source stock; cut, tool, program, machine, inspect, and ship multiple jobs; qualify for expansion.
requirements.automation: A visible-input bot completes the chapter without teleporting or direct state mutation; targeted station and save/control E2E suites pass.
requirements.story: Zach welcomes, teaches, challenges, and graduates the founder; customer, supplier, and first-hire beats have consequential callbacks.
requirements.audio: Opening, tour, station tutorials, task validation, equipment sequences, ambience, and graduation are audible, synchronized, ducked, and optional.
requirements.visuals: Founder variants, Zach, Garage Bay, customers, hires, equipment, tools, task views, and story scenes match the approved 32-bit direction.
requirements.facility: Garage stations are spatially playable and expansion arrives at the Job Shop without presenting later facilities as complete.
requirements.difficulty: Five-job mastery curve includes recoverable setup errors, true G/M code, quality grading, and a documented graduation threshold.

story.evidence: tests/e2e_chapter_one_story.py; new callbacks remain under integration

audio.evidence: audio gates cover declared assets; final chapter-wide audible review remains required

visuals.evidence: storybook and player-scene validators; final consistency review remains required

difficulty.evidence: five jobs and grading work; final balance certification remains required

requirements.gameplay: Operate a larger multi-station Job Shop; quote work; schedule capacity; hire, qualify, and assign a production team; manage payroll and delivery.
requirements.automation: A deterministic visible-input bot completes every Chapter 2 objective and regression tests cover staffing, capacity, saves, failure, and recovery.
requirements.story: Zach shifts from shop teacher to leadership mentor; employee and customer choices create later callbacks.
requirements.audio: New facility, staff, communications, production stations, successes, failures, and chapter transition have mixed dialogue, SFX, and ambience.
requirements.visuals: Job Shop map, station states, staff work/meander animations, profiles, customers, scenes, and expansion views are final-quality and variant-safe.
requirements.facility: The Job Shop is fully operable and meaningfully larger than the Garage; Connected Plant unlock conditions are implemented.
requirements.difficulty: Introduces simultaneous work, labor/capacity tradeoffs, due dates, and cash-flow pressure without grind-only gates.

requirements.gameplay: Connect machines and quality data; diagnose bottlenecks; control WIP, maintenance, traceability, and multi-customer priorities.
requirements.automation: Full chapter bot plus deterministic bottleneck, traceability, maintenance, save, and failure-path E2E proof.
requirements.story: Growth exposes communication and measurement failures; Zach teaches systems thinking while team/customer arcs continue.
requirements.audio: Connected-plant equipment, alerts, communications, mentor scenes, ambience zones, and transition cues are complete and mixed.
requirements.visuals: Connected Plant, dashboards, material flow, expanded workforce, machine states, failures, repairs, and scenes are production-ready.
requirements.facility: Connected Plant is fully traversable and operable with visible material and information flow.
requirements.difficulty: Requires diagnosis and prioritization rather than faster repetition; consequences remain recoverable and legible.

requirements.gameplay: Standardize processes, deploy automation, validate cells, manage engineering changes, and protect quality during scale-up.
requirements.automation: Full chapter bot plus automation commissioning, change-control, quality, save, and alternate-strategy E2E proof.
requirements.story: Automation choices affect people, customers, and operating culture; Zach challenges the founder to automate responsibly.
requirements.audio: Robotics, automated cells, alarms, engineering reviews, mentor scenes, ambience, and transitions are complete and accessible.
requirements.visuals: Smart Factory, robotics, guarded cells, engineering areas, team roles, automation states, and story scenes are final-quality.
requirements.facility: Smart Factory is fully operable with safe, readable automated material flow and expansion logic.
requirements.difficulty: Balances capital, reliability, people, and throughput; optimization has multiple viable strategies.

requirements.gameplay: Build resilient unattended production; manage monitoring, preventive maintenance, exceptions, cybersecurity, and escalation.
requirements.automation: Full chapter bot plus unattended-run, fault, cyber, recovery, save, and no-intervention certification E2E proof.
requirements.story: The founder learns when systems and people can be trusted; earlier staffing and process decisions pay off or create risk.
requirements.audio: Night factory, remote alerts, faults, recovery, mentor scenes, music, and quiet-zone ambience are mixed without fatigue.
requirements.visuals: Lights-Out Complex, night states, monitoring, automated logistics, faults, remote views, and scenes are production-ready.
requirements.facility: The complex supports real unattended operation and meaningful remote intervention, not a cosmetic reskin.
requirements.difficulty: Tests resilience and exception handling with fair warning, diagnosable causes, and bounded recovery.

requirements.gameplay: Lead a manufacturing campus; allocate capital; develop leaders; balance customers, workforce, supply chain, community, and succession.
requirements.automation: Full campaign bot from new game through ending plus chapter, alternate-ending, migration, performance, accessibility, and clean-install certification.
requirements.story: All major founder, Zach, employee, supplier, and customer arcs resolve; choices create earned ending variants and a postgame path.
requirements.audio: Campus, executive and floor scenes, finale, ending variants, credits, music, ambience, SFX, captions, and mix certification are complete.
requirements.visuals: Titan Campus, full workforce, leadership, customer and community scenes, ending variants, credits, and postgame visuals are final-quality.
requirements.facility: The campus is fully playable and expresses the accumulated systems and choices from all prior facilities.
requirements.difficulty: Final decisions synthesize technical and business mastery; ending gates reward judgment, not repetitive volume.
